title: Diverse Fishing
description: Encourages Fishing by adding Biome-Specific & Structure-Specific Fishing Loot, rewarding you more if you Fish in different Places!
body:
![Diverse Fishing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d64ca7e46ad673c8d8a1380d810455a38e8e9f4a.png) 🎣 **This Datapack changes how Fishing works in the game, making it more fun and rewarding!** ⚠️ **ALPHA RELEASE, EXPECT BUGS!** ⚠️ ## Features - Biome and Structure Dependent Loot Tables! **(WORK IN PROGRESS)** - Loot Tables with Non-Renewable Items (e.g. Armor Trims) making them Renewable with a trade-off of you having to Fish them up. - Staying true to the Vanilla Style, no new Custom Items or Enchantments added. - Appropriately categorized Loot Table, moving some Junk, Treasure and Fish to their suitable Biomes and Structures.
🎣 List of Biomes & Structures with custom Fishing Loot Tables

    🍂 Biomes
  • Birch Forest
  • Badlands
  • Cherry Grove
  • Deep Dark
  • Dripstone Caves
  • Lukewarm Ocean
  • Deep Lukewarm Ocean
  • Plains
  • River
  • Beach
  • Cold Ocean
  • Deep Cold Ocean
  • Dark Forest
  • Pale Garden
  • Forest
  • Jungle (& Variants)
  • Lush Cave
  • Swamp
  • Warm Ocean

    • 🏢 Structures
  • Village
  • Ancient City

🪙 Loot Examples
    🌼 **Birch Forest Loot**
    ![Birch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/910fe1f9f174a0dc2cf0804721871c3196b6be79.png)
    🛖 **Village Loot**
    ![Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e82ea87b0682e376eb50e464b5a7cdcfe62eb6f2.png)
    I will leave the rest of the Loot for you to Discover, don't want to ruin the immersion and surprise now, do we? :)
### ⛏️ Roadmap 🏗️ *This section will be removed upon Version Release 1.0* - Support for more Minecraft versions other than 1.21.5 ✅ - Add the Weight/Rarity system to every Biome, all added Biomes currently has the Rarity System 🟡 - Finish up Loot Tables for all Biomes and Structures 🟡 ## Guides & More ### ❓ How to install **Existing Worlds :** 1. Download the Datapack. 2. Open your Minecraft World and click on "Edit" in the World Select Menu. 3. Click "Open World Folder". 4. Open the "datapacks" folder and drag the downloaded .zip file in to that Folder. 5. Rejoin the World (Recommended), or type in the Command : [ **/datapack enable "file/FileNameHere** ] to Enable the Datapack (**NOT** Recommended). **New Worlds :** 1. Click "Create New World". 2. Locate the "More" Option, then "Data Packs", there you can drag and drop the Datapack directly in the Game Menu, or Click "Open Pack Folder" and drop it there. **Fabric :** Requires Fabric API to work, drag and drop into the "mods" folder. **Forge & NeoForge :** Simply drag and drop into the "mods" folder. ℹ️ To check if the Datapack has been installed correctly or not, you can type in "**/loot give @s fish diverse_fishing:gameplay/fishing/loot_table/ANYBIOMEHERE ~ ~ ~ mainhand**", it should give you the loot of that Biome if installed correctly ## Licensing & Credits If you use this Datapack for a Video, Blog or anything else, **please credit me** and **put a link to this Modrinth Page**. You are not allowed to reupload, redistribute or do anything else without credits. **Extra Credits** - Thank you Ewan Howell for Blockbench's Title Generator ([Ewan Howell's Website](https://ewanhowell.com/)) - Thank you jbritain for the Banner Screenshot's Shaderpack ([Visual Vibrance](https://modrinth.com/shader/visual-vibrance))
